app.title: Brewfile Picker
app.description: Search and select Homebrew packages, then create and share a Brewfile from presets or an existing Brewfile.
summary.title: Summary
index.missing: package-index has not been generated. Search and warnings are limited.
search.title: Package Search
search.label: Homebrew package
search.placeholder: e.g. git, python, visual studio code
import.title: Brewfile Import
import.dropHint: or drop it on the page
import.tooLarge: Files larger than 1 MiB cannot be imported.
import.binary: This does not look like a readable text file.
import.oneFile: Import only one Brewfile at a time.
import.replaced: Replaced the current work with the Brewfile contents.
advanced.title: Advanced add
advanced.name: App name
advanced.rawSingleLine: A raw line must be a single line.
advanced.invalidMas: mas requires an app name and a positive App Store ID. Quotes and line breaks cannot be used.
drop.title: Drop Brewfile to import
selected.title: Selected Items
warning.title: Items That Need Review
warning.invalidToken: token cannot contain spaces, quotes, or line breaks.
warning.unknown: This package was not found in the current package-index. Check the name.
warning.deprecated: Homebrew marks this package as deprecated.
warning.disabled: Homebrew marks this package as disabled.
share.title: Share
share.long: The URL is long. Check that chat or email apps do not truncate it.
share.tooLong: The URL is too long for sharing. Reduce the number of selected items.
share.omitted: items are not included in URL sharing.
share.routeMismatch: The URL preset and shared data preset differ, so the shared data was used.
share.revisionMismatch: The shared preset revision differs from the current revision.
share.invalid: Could not load the share URL.
storage.available: Previous work remains in this browser.
storage.invalidCleared: Saved work could not be loaded, so it was cleared.
filename.title: Filename
filename.sanitizedNote: Characters that are hard to use in filenames are replaced with -.
download.disabledConfirm: The selected items include packages marked as disabled. Download the Brewfile anyway?
install.title: Install Steps
install.homebrewNote: Run this first on a Mac that does not have Homebrew installed.
install.bundlePending: After you download a Brewfile, the command to run it will appear here.
install.bundleNote: It is usually saved in Downloads. If you changed the location, specify that path.
install.bundleNoteCollision: If a file with the same name already exists, match the actual filename in Downloads.
privacy.title: Processed in your browser
privacy.browserOnly: Brewfile import, editing, and generation happen in your browser and are not sent to a server.
footer.homebrewThanksAfter: package metadata. Thanks to Homebrew contributors.
live.copyFailed: Could not copy. Check your browser permissions.
